emails.body: RE: REMINDER THAT ATTY ROUNDTABLE LUNCH MEETINGS HAVE MOVED TO THURSDAY, AT NOON, IN EB 3872 Since I have to attend the Enron Net Works staff meetings Thursdays at noon, might it be possible to pick a different day? To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal); Cook, Mary; Gray, Barbara N.; Greenberg, Mark; Hendry, Brent; Koehler, Anne C.; Leite, Francisco Pinto; Nelson, Cheryl; Sayre, Frank; Shackleton, Sara
